The default setting in "Sessions on Chart" is not valid. The London session should start at UTC 7 AM, but for me, the indicator used 3 AM, which is still Tokyo session. "Sessions [LuxAlgo]" would be a better indicator since it uses UTC time and all the values are correct by default.

London open is in the middle of the night for me so I don’t trade it. However there is another great time of the day to trade. Just trade the London New York overlap. In particular the best time of the day is between the Wall Street open at 930 ET until 11 AM ET around London close and New York lunch. That is most volatile time period in the markets. You can often catch big momentum right into 11 am with some wild fast moves.
Does this happen on any day or mostly in the mid-week or on certain days?
best session for me to trade since london session starts at 9pm for me. I either go to sleep happy or mad depending on how my trades went lol

I'm from England so I trade the London open, the way I trade it though is using a moving average and a RSI, I wait for a pullback to the 40 on the RSI if in an uptrend and 60 if in a downtrend and wait for a few candles to show momentum in the direction of the trend and enter with a 3:1 risk reward risking 1% at a time, I also have been using this a little for NY open using eur/USD, this strategy is on the one minute and it has amazing results for me, the only problem is you have to be able to identify trending markets as opposed to ranging markets which not all traders can do but the moving average helps a ton 👍
Will this work for nasdaq as well?

You nailed it on the time frames!!!! Il usually look for setups from 315am est to 630/7am on EURUSD or GBPUSD then break for breakfast a buss out a quick 1 mile run, shower and back to the charts from 8 till 11/12. Oh and second cup of coffee!! lol
